honest_disclosure_raw_91_C3.claim: This cycle produced 1 markdown document + 1 witness JSON. No new domains registered, no kick witnesses for any of the 15 prerequisites created beyond this census itself.
caveats: 5 of 15 prerequisites are external-stable papers/datasets — HEXA-WEAVE cannot kick them; only cite, monitor, and design fall-backs
Tier 3 items are axiomatic; NO_KICK is the correct disposition, not avoidance
Coverage gap: census enumerates direct prerequisites only; transitive closures (Tarski → Goedel → PA) not enumerated; depth-2 census requires explicit follow-up cycle
raw 86 cost-attribution is light: doc-hours only, no compute/storage/bandwidth (zero this cycle), no opportunity cost vs other 90d-gate work
